name: Cranberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and stir in sugar, mixing well.
2. Add eggs, almond extract, and orange juice to the mixture.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon) and add them to the batter, stirring just until combined.
4. Gently fold in the cranberry sauce.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the pan and let cool on a rack.
